meta.title: Spatial grid of climate-related hazards (MVP sample)
meta.methodology: Continuous values on a regular WGS84 grid. This file uses illustrative analytical fields. In production, replace with bilinear (or higher-order) extraction from spatial climate-model databases (e.g. ERA5 reanalysis, EURO-CORDEX, downscaled CMIP6) in NetCDF/GeoTIFF/Zarr, reprojected to this grid or sampled at the point.
